extra_join.question: Show the name and the release year of the song by the youngest singer.
extra_join.gold_sql: SELECT song_name ,  song_release_year FROM singer ORDER BY age LIMIT 1
extra_join.pred_sql:
SELECT s.Name, s.Song_release_year
FROM singer s
JOIN singer_in_concert sic ON s.Singer_ID = sic.Singer_ID
JOIN concert c ON sic.concert_ID = c.concert_ID
WHERE s.Age = (SELECT MIN(Age) FROM singer)
ORDER BY s.Song_release_year;

AND s.Is_male = 1
